conversations.jd_after_snapshot:
# Sales Trainer

## About Us
WOGOM is a B2B Commerce and Retail Enablement Platform, empowering 6,000+ retailers and 450+ sellers across India. Our goal is to build a connected ecosystem where technology, capital, and commerce converge to help Indian retailers scale with confidence.

## Role Overview
The Sales Trainer will design and deliver effective training programs to drive pitch retention and sales team performance. They will bring a strong background in sales expertise and a mindset focused on creative training methods.

## Key Responsibilities
• Design and deliver comprehensive training programs for the sales team, focusing on company information, pitches, and product knowledge.
• Create engaging training experiences using gamification techniques to drive employee participation and pitch retention.
• Evaluate training programs and identify areas for improvement to drive sales team performance.
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams to develop and deliver training programs aligned with business objectives.
• Train sales team members and devise strategies to ensure pitch retention.
• Identify opportunities to expand training programs and develop new content.

## Requirements
### Must-Have Skills
• Expertise in gamification and training development.
• Experience in training and sales principles.
• In-depth knowledge of sales techniques.
• Strong communication skills.
• Experience in evaluating training programs.

### Nice-to-Have Skills
• Strong communication skills for facilitating training sessions.
• Experience in developing training programs for large groups.
• Knowledge of adult learning principles.

## Who Will Succeed in This Role
The ideal candidate will be results-driven, collaborative, and creative, with a focus on driving sales team performance and pitch retention.

## Success Metrics
• Design and deliver a comprehensive training program within 30 days.
• Evaluate the training program's effectiveness within 90 days.
• Refine and expand the training program within 6 months.

## How to Apply
To apply, submit your application through our website, including your resume and a cover letter outlining your experience and qualifications.
